content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative no-training improvement framework as the base execution layer for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid system where Self-Refine’s iterative feedback loop absorbs inconsistent perspectives from self-reflection mechanisms to refine outputs without external data or supervised training. This hybrid system solves the core limitation of existing multi-perspective reflection that often lacks a structured iterative improvement path, while letting Self-Refine move beyond single-perspective self-critique to catch blind spots in initial outputs.
